entity.name: Rosemary (Uche) Chukwuka
entity.description: Self-taught full-stack software engineer from Nigeria building open source fintech tools for African communities.

projects.name: SwiftPay
projects.description: Open source mobile banking app with purpose-restricted spending transfers — solving remittance misuse for Nigerian diaspora sending $25B home yearly. Built with React Native, TypeScript, and Paystack.

plans.name: General Development Support
plans.description: Support ongoing development of SwiftPay and future open source fintech tools for African communities.
